headline: Nasdaq Announces 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders
summary: NEW YORK, May 14, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Nasdaq, Inc. (Nasdaq: NDAQ) has scheduled its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders for June 10, 2026, at 8:00 AM ET. The virtual meeting website can be accessed 15 minutes prior to the meeting by visiting: www.virtualshareholdermeeting.com/NDAQ2026. Shareholders of record as of April 13, 2026 will be eligible to vote and participate in the Annual Meeting. Nasdaq’s 2026 Proxy Statement and 2025 Annual Report on Form 10-K are available at ir.nasdaq.com or

headline: NDAQ Stock Trades Above 50-Day SMA: What Should Investors Do Now?
summary: Nasdaq rides on rising non-trading revenues, strategic buyouts and dividend plans to fuel long-term growth.
